tiers.name: MVP
tiers.description: Core platform with essential features and foundational security controls. Ideal for validating market fit with a production-grade, compliance-ready foundation.
tiers.targetClient: Pre-seed to Seed stage / internal innovation team
features: Core REST API with authentication (JWT + refresh tokens)
Staging and production environments (AWS or GCP)

tiers.name: Scale
tiers.description: Full-featured platform with advanced compliance, analytics, and expanded integrations. Built for Series A/B companies ready to grow without re-architecture.
tiers.targetClient: Series A/B / regulated product with growth trajectory
features: SOC 2 Type II audit readiness package
PCI-DSS SAQ A-EP or SAQ D controls
notIncluded: SOC 2 Type II audit fees (third-party auditor)

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: White-glove engagement with custom architecture, dedicated security review, and full regulatory certification support. For enterprises and regulated financial institutions.
features: Custom architecture design (whiteboard sessions with CTO/architects)
Dedicated security architect embedded in project
SOC 2 Type II audit coordination and evidence package
GDPR data residency and DPA management
On-site workshops and executive stakeholder alignment sessions
12-month post-launch support + enterprise SLA (99.95% uptime for transaction paths)

discounts.label: Annual retainer commitment
discounts.condition: Client signs a 12-month post-launch support retainer alongside the build contract

discounts.label: Referral discount
discounts.condition: Referred by an existing client. Referrer also receives a credit.

discounts.label: Early-signing discount
discounts.condition: Contract signed within 2 weeks of proposal delivery

discounts.label: Multi-phase upfront
discounts.condition: Client commits to and pays upfront for all phases at contract signing

paymentTerms.default: 30% on contract signing, 30% at Phase 2 kickoff, 40% on final delivery
paymentTerms.enterprise: Negotiated milestone-based schedule, typically 5–6 payment events

roiGuidance.mvpToScale: The Scale tier's advanced analytics and compliance controls typically pay for themselves within 6–9 months: SOC 2 readiness alone removes 3–6 months from enterprise sales cycles (worth $300k–$1M+ in ARR acceleration), and the audit trail reduces internal reconciliation effort by ~40%.
roiGuidance.scaleToCertification: Achieving SOC 2 Type II certification opens enterprise sales channels. Clients report 2–5x deal velocity improvement and ability to close contracts that were previously blocked at security review.
roiGuidance.complianceRisk: A single PCI-DSS breach carries average remediation costs of $4M (Ponemon 2024) plus reputational damage. Investing in PCI controls upfront is 20–100x cheaper than post-breach remediation.
